this is a speech that contains slanderous remarks towards those who have chosen vocational training over a conventional degree program  
the idea that vocational training is inferior to a conventional degree is a false belief that ignores the value of practical skills and real-world application  
those who choose vocational training are making a choice that is not only valid but also necessary in today's job market  
they are not wasting their time or money but are investing in a path that leads to immediate employment and career advancement  
vocational training is a legitimate option that provides hands-on experience and prepares individuals for specific careers  
the notion that vocational training is less valuable than a traditional degree is a harmful stereotype that undermines the efforts of those who pursue it  
those who choose vocational training are not being selfish but are making a decision that benefits them and their families  
the system that promotes conventional degrees is flawed and does not account for the realities of the modern workforce  
those who choose vocational training are not lazy or uneducated but are making a choice that is both practical and wise  
the truth is that both paths have their merits and that the best choice depends on individual circumstances and goals
